body_txt: A Gambit Pileup involves two or more people with separate agendas each hatching complicated plans , which then collide and interfere with each other. The storyline is thrown into chaos and even the most savvy fans can't predict how it will all end. If there are a lot of plotters involved, be prepared to make a flow diagram to keep up with everyone's scheme. A Psychological Thriller is more likely to have one of these Often overlaps with Flock of Wolves or Right Hand Versus Left Hand , and can often be the result of The Big Bad Shuffle . May involve Colliding Criminal Conspiracies . Expect the plotters to try to salvage the situation with Xanatos Speed Chess . Expect lots of I Know You Know I Know . Expect a lot of people to be Out-Gambitted , a lot of Unwitting Pawns , a lot of saying " All According to Plan! ", and maybe someone to have the Last Plan Standing . Can easily turn into Hoist by Their Own Petard for someone, especially if all the colliding plans originated from one person who didn't anticipate their schemes interfering with each other. Compare Gambit Roulette (one person has an improbable plan that would only make sense if they are near omniscient) and Multilayer Façade . Particularly convoluted and fantastical versions of this trope can dip straight into Mind Screw . A distant relative of Zany Scheme Chicken (zany schemes countered ad nauseam ). noreallife
